title: Ease is allowed to be the new pattern
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for releasing the expectation of struggle and allowing financial ease.
excerpt: A short energy statement for releasing the ingrained expectation that money always comes with difficulty, and allowing ease as the new baseline. Use when calm financial conditions feel suspicious rather than real.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 17 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you notice yourself bracing for a financial setback even when one isn't present, or treating ease as temporary.

content.text: A short energy statement for releasing the expectation of struggle and claiming ease as a pattern rather than an exception. The release names what was conditioned; the allow names what is possible.
I am ready to release the expectation that struggle is the normal state of my money life. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow ease as the new pattern — steady, continuous, and real. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 17 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
